title: Evangelion Unit 03 and Bardiel
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Unit-03 and Bardiel.             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Oct 26, 2010 1:48 am Am I still the only one who doesn´t get how he got hijacked by an Angel? Was Unit-03 an Angel itself or something?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Oct 26, 2010 2:13 am It got infected by the angel when it went through that cloud bank on the way to Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by jojojoker » Sun Oct 31, 2010 9:32 am ^Yes, an infection. You have to remember Eva's are organic beings therefore making it susceptible to biological infections. Seeing how "germ-Bardiel" was probably the most aggravating virus with the whole "needing to rejoin with Adam so I can start the Third Impact" intention, it's not surprising how and why it turned EVA-03 to something so malicious.

[]:             Quote Post by 3rd Party » Mon Nov 08, 2010 9:25 pm i was actually wondering myself what the significance behind the electric storm in the cloud...i hadn't thought to link it to the Angel taking over Unit-03. i'm only on episode 19, and i don't understand how Unit-01's outbursts are more controlled than what happened with Unit-03...

[]:             Quote Post by jojojoker » Tue Nov 09, 2010 1:03 pm 3rd Party wrote: i was actually wondering myself what the significance behind the electric storm in the cloud...i hadn't thought to link it to the Angel taking over Unit-03. i'm only on episode 19, and i don't understand how Unit-01's outbursts are more controlled than what happened with Unit-03...

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Nov 09, 2010 1:28 pm 3rd Party wrote: i was actually wondering myself what the significance behind the electric storm in the cloud...i hadn't thought to link it to the Angel taking over Unit-03. i'm only on episode 19, and i don't understand how Unit-01's outbursts are more controlled than what happened with Unit-03...

[]: Evangelion Unit-03 and Bardiel.             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Oct 26, 2010 1:48 am Am I still the only one who doesn´t get how he got hijacked by an Angel? Was Unit-03 an Angel itself or something?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Oct 26, 2010 2:13 am It got infected by the angel when it went through that cloud bank on the way to Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by jojojoker » Sun Oct 31, 2010 9:32 am ^Yes, an infection. You have to remember Eva's are organic beings therefore making it susceptible to biological infections. Seeing how "germ-Bardiel" was probably the most aggravating virus with the whole "needing to rejoin with Adam so I can start the Third Impact" intention, it's not surprising how and why it turned EVA-03 to something so malicious.
